taskTemplate.name: Credit Score Disclosure (Pre-Approval)
taskTemplate.description: Quality Review and Delivery of Credit Score Disclosure.

subTaskTemplate.name: Sub-Task Name
subTaskTemplate.description:
All scores for all borrowers from all credit bureaus pulled on the credit report are evidenced on the FACT Act Disclosure.
(Be sure to check second borrower pair as well).

subTaskTemplate.name: Sub-Task Name
subTaskTemplate.description: Ensure the 'Material Terms of Credit set by Credit Score' and 'Credit Score for Disclosure Notice' check boxes on the Disclosure Notice are checked when a credit score is available and unchecked when a score is not available.

subTaskTemplate.name: Sub-Task Name
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify that the Key Factors informational text is present for every credit score to be disclosed for all borrowers and all bureaus pulled.

subTaskTemplate.name: Sub-Task Name
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify eConsent is received before sending electronically.

subTaskTemplate.name: Sub-Task Name
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify email and phone are present before sending electronically.

subTaskTemplate.name: Sub-Task Name
subTaskTemplate.description: Ready to Send Disclosure. Mark Done to send electronically. Mark Issue to send via mail (must complete manually).
